svg.text: Production-Grade Kubernetes Platform on AWS — HIPSTER-SHOP
Self-Managed · 6-Node HA · kubeadm · Calico · Istio · ArgoCD · Prometheus · Loki · Jaeger · Falco · Velero
VPC — 10.0.0.0/16 · DNS enabled · IGW (public) + NAT Gateway (private)
Kubernetes Cluster — kubeadm · Calico CNI · AWS CCM · StorageClass gp3 (default, encrypted)
Namespace: hipster-shop · Istio sidecar injection · mTLS STRICT · NetworkPolicy default-deny
NGINX Ingress → frontend:8080 · NetworkPolicy: default-deny + explicit allow rules per service
